summary: Admin Moderation Bug Fix Testing Complete - All 5 features verified working. Backend API returns pending listings with owner info and effectiveCommission. Approve/reject functionality works with Telegram notifications. Frontend shows pending listings grid, detail modal with owner profile link, commission display, and reject modal with reason input.

issues: Some listing cards show promotional images (Email/Telegram notification banners) instead of actual listing photos - likely uploaded incorrectly by partners

critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent accessibility warning - missing DialogTitle for screen readers (minor)
401 Unauthorized errors on /api/v2/auth/me during initial page load - expected when not authenticated
seed_data_creation: Used existing pending listings: lst-mm5nggz6 (approved), lst-mm61z101 (rejected during testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin moderation is fully working. 4 pending listings remaining after tests (2 were approved/rejected during API testing). Tab 'Партнёры' has been removed. New API /api/admin/moderation is working correctly.

1_get_moderation_api.test: Returns pending listings with owner info and effectiveCommission
1_get_moderation_api.result: Returns 4 listings with owner details (first_name, email, phone, telegram_id, custom_commission_rate) and effectiveCommission calculated

2_patch_approve.result: Listing approved, status changed to ACTIVE, Telegram notification sent

3_patch_reject.test: Reject listing with action='reject' and rejectReason
3_patch_reject.result: Listing rejected with reason, validation requires rejectReason, notification sent

4_frontend_pending_listings.result: Grid shows 4 pending listings with badge 'На проверке', owner name, price, commission rate

5_frontend_detail_modal.test: Click on card, see details with owner profile link
5_frontend_detail_modal.result: Modal shows: image carousel, title, location, owner card with name/email/phone, 'Профиль' link to /admin/users/{owner_id}, commission info (rate + type), Одобрить/Отклонить buttons

6_frontend_reject_modal.test: Click Отклонить, see reason input modal
6_frontend_reject_modal.result: Reject modal shows: reason textarea, quick reason buttons (Некачественные фото, Неполное описание, etc.), Telegram notification info

frontend_test_results.moderation_page_load: PASS - Shows 'Модерация объявлений' title and 4 pending listings
frontend_test_results.listing_cards: PASS - Each card shows: image, badge, title, location, owner name, price, commission %
frontend_test_results.detail_modal: PASS - Image carousel, owner card with profile link, commission info, approve/reject buttons
frontend_test_results.reject_modal: PASS - Textarea for reason, quick reason badges, Telegram notification info
frontend_test_results.partners_tab_removed: PASS - No 'Партнёры' tab visible in sidebar, replaced with 'Заявки партнёров'
